title: Migrate NIST ECDH from EVP to native wc_ecc_*
description: The nist_ecdh module in wolfcrypt/src/ecdh.rs currently uses the OpenSSL compat layer (EC_KEY/EC_GROUP/ECDH_compute_key) gated on wolfssl_openssl_extra. The goal is to replace it with native wolfCrypt wc_ecc_* calls — same pattern as ecdsa_native.rs and the RSA migration. After this migration, wolfssl_openssl_extra will only be needed by keywrap and AES-CFB.
